title: Laceration - sutures or staples - at home
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives unless reuse terms are confirmed for the exact content.
supports: Sutures and staples are used to help wounds heal properly.
Patient education can include keeping the wound clean and following clinician instructions.
Warning signs include infection concern or the wound opening.
This source supports wound-care education, not autonomous decisions about removal timing or wound readiness.
